lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: Counting forward means numbers get bigger. Counting backward means numbers get smaller. Numbers stay in order.
lesson_snippet.visual_model: Number line 0–20 with arrows forward and backward.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Skipping numbers or reversing sequence incorrectly.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Numbers follow an order forward and backward.

hint_ladder.hint_2: Forward gets bigger. Backward gets smaller.
hint_ladder.hint_3: Use a number line if needed.

guided_practice.coaching_feedback: Numbers get bigger when moving forward.
Backward means move to the smaller number.

next_practice_recommendation.reason: Converted planning artifact only; runtime pathway mapping pending.

source_metadata.source_file: Grade 1 Math Production Number Sense Skill 2 Count Forward + Backward
